messages.content: Recuerda que prefiero respuestas en español

<tool_call>{"name": "save_memory", "arguments": {"content": "El usuario prefiere respuestas en español", "tags": ["preference", "language"], "importance": "high"}}</tool_call>
✅ Lo recuerdo. De ahora en adelante responderé siempre en español.
Save that I'm working on a FastAPI project called 'shop-api' using PostgreSQL

<tool_call>{"name": "save_memory", "arguments": {"content": "Working on FastAPI project 'shop-api' with PostgreSQL database", "tags": ["project", "tech-stack", "fastapi", "postgresql"], "importance": "medium"}}</tool_call>
✅ Saved. I'll keep this context for future sessions.
¿Qué proyectos recuerdas que estoy haciendo?
<tool_call>{"name": "search_memory", "arguments": {"query": "proyecto activo working on", "tags": ["project"], "limit": 10}}</tool_call>
What did we work on last week?
<tool_call>{"name": "get_timeline", "arguments": {"days_ago": 7, "limit": 20}}</tool_call>
Olvida todo lo que guardaste sobre mí

⚠️ Esto eliminará TODA la memoria guardada. ¿Confirmas?

Si confirmas:
<tool_call>{"name": "clear_memory", "arguments": {"confirm": true}}</tool_call>

Alternativamente, puedo eliminar solo una categoría específica (proyectos, preferencias, etc.).
Remember my work email is ana@empresa.com

<tool_call>{"name": "save_memory", "arguments": {"content": "Work email: ana@empresa.com", "tags": ["contact", "email", "personal"], "importance": "medium", "privacy": "local_only"}}</tool_call>
✅ Email saved to local memory only (never sent to cloud).
¿Cuál es mi configuración de Docker que guardé antes?
<tool_call>{"name": "search_memory", "arguments": {"query": "docker configuration config", "limit": 5}}</tool_call>
Add a note: deploy always to staging first, then production

<tool_call>{"name": "save_memory", "arguments": {"content": "Deployment workflow: staging first, then production. Never deploy directly to prod.", "tags": ["workflow", "deployment", "devops", "rule"], "importance": "high"}}</tool_call>
✅ Deploy rule saved. I'll remind you of this whenever deployment comes up.
Busca en mi memoria todo lo relacionado con Python
<tool_call>{"name": "search_memory", "arguments": {"query": "python", "limit": 15}}</tool_call>
What context do you have about my current project?
<tool_call>{"name": "search_memory", "arguments": {"query": "current project active working", "tags": ["project"], "limit": 5}}</tool_call>
Guarda que mi servidor de producción está en 192.168.1.50

<tool_call>{"name": "save_memory", "arguments": {"content": "Production server IP: 192.168.1.50", "tags": ["infrastructure", "server", "production"], "importance": "high", "privacy": "local_only"}}</tool_call>
✅ Guardado en memoria local. Las IPs de servidores se almacenan solo localmente por seguridad.
Show me my memory timeline for today
<tool_call>{"name": "get_timeline", "arguments": {"days_ago": 1, "limit": 50}}</tool_call>
Delete memories tagged as 'temporary'
<tool_call>{"name": "delete_by_tags", "arguments": {"tags": ["temporary"], "confirm": true}}</tool_call>
Remember: I use vim keybindings everywhere

<tool_call>{"name": "save_memory", "arguments": {"content": "User uses vim keybindings (hjkl navigation, modal editing). Configure all editors and tools with vim mode.", "tags": ["preference", "editor", "vim"], "importance": "high"}}</tool_call>
✅ Noted — vim mode for everything.
